niche: full forms, abbreviations and acronyms used in India — exams, government, banking, technology and everyday terms
audience: Indian students and professionals searching for the full form or meaning of an abbreviation
topicGuidance: Prefer explainer topics: what an acronym stands for and means, category round-ups (banking abbreviations, medical short forms, government scheme acronyms), exam-relevant lists, and how-to-remember guides. Be accurate and India-focused.
